conversation_memory.content: Hello there, it's great to hear from you. How are you doing today? It's completely normal to just start with a simple "HI" when you're feeling a bit uncertain or overwhelmed. Take a deep breath and know that you're safe here. We can chat about anything that's on your mind. By the way, I don't see any new tasks or updates, so we can start fresh. What's been going on, and how can I support you today?
